tool_description: Access current weather data, forecasts, and historical weather for any location worldwide.

api_list.name: get_current_weather
api_list.description: Retrieve current weather conditions for a given city or coordinates.

api_list.name: get_5day_forecast
api_list.description: Returns a 5-day weather forecast in 3-hour intervals for a specified city.

api_list.name: get_air_quality
api_list.description: Retrieve Air Quality Index and pollutant concentrations for a location.

tool_description: Search for flights, compare prices, and retrieve airline schedules across hundreds of carriers.

api_list.name: search_flights
api_list.description: Search for available flights between two airports on a given date.

required_parameters.name: origin
required_parameters.description: IATA code of the departure airport, e.g. LHR

required_parameters.name: destination
required_parameters.description: IATA code of the arrival airport, e.g. JFK

api_list.name: get_flight_details
api_list.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific flight by flight number.

required_parameters.name: flight_id
required_parameters.description: Unique flight identifier returned by search_flights

api_list.name: get_cheapest_dates
api_list.description: Find the cheapest travel dates for a given route within a date range.

tool_description: Search hotels, check availability, and retrieve accommodation details from a global inventory.

api_list.name: search_hotels
api_list.description: Search for available hotels in a destination for specified check-in and check-out dates.

api_list.name: get_hotel_details
api_list.description: Retrieve amenities, photos, and reviews for a specific hotel.

required_parameters.name: hotel_id
required_parameters.description: Unique hotel identifier from search results

api_list.name: get_room_availability
api_list.description: Check room types and availability for a hotel on specific dates.

tool_description: Search Amazon's product catalog, retrieve listings, prices, and reviews.

api_list.name: search_products
api_list.description: Search for products on Amazon by keyword with optional category and price filters.

optional_parameters.name: sort_by
optional_parameters.description: Sort order: relevance, price_asc, price_desc, rating

api_list.name: get_product_details
api_list.description: Get detailed information about a specific product including specifications and images.

api_list.name: get_product_reviews
api_list.description: Retrieve customer reviews and ratings for a product.

api_list.name: check_price_history
api_list.description: Get price history data for an Amazon product over the past 90 days.

optional_parameters.name: days
optional_parameters.description: Number of days of history to retrieve (max 90)

tool_description: Real-time and historical currency exchange rates for 170+ currencies.

api_list.name: get_exchange_rate
api_list.description: Get the current exchange rate between two currencies.

required_parameters.name: from_currency
required_parameters.description: Source currency ISO 4217 code, e.g. USD

required_parameters.name: to_currency
required_parameters.description: Target currency ISO 4217 code, e.g. EUR

api_list.name: convert_currency
api_list.description: Convert an amount from one currency to another using the latest exchange rate.

optional_parameters.name: date
optional_parameters.description: Historical rate date YYYY-MM-DD (omit for latest)

tool_description: Convert addresses to coordinates and vice versa, and look up place details.

api_list.name: geocode_address
api_list.description: Convert a human-readable address into geographic coordinates (latitude and longitude).

api_list.name: reverse_geocode
api_list.description: Convert geographic coordinates into a human-readable address.

api_list.name: get_directions
api_list.description: Get turn-by-turn directions between two locations.

optional_parameters.name: mode
optional_parameters.description: Travel mode: driving, walking, bicycling, transit

optional_parameters.name: avoid
optional_parameters.description: Features to avoid: tolls, highways, ferries

tool_description: Query Shopify-powered storefronts for product listings, inventory, and collections.

api_list.name: list_products
api_list.description: Retrieve a paginated list of products from a Shopify store.

api_list.name: get_product_by_id
api_list.description: Get full details of a single product including variants and inventory levels.

tool_description: Real-time flight status, delays, gate changes, and airport information.

api_list.name: get_flight_status
api_list.description: Get real-time status for a specific flight by flight number and date.

api_list.name: get_airport_info
api_list.description: Retrieve airport details including terminals, gates, and nearby services.

api_list.name: get_departures
api_list.description: Get departure board for an airport within a time window.
